name: Medianoche en Asia: Comer · Bailar · Soñar
original_name: Medianoche en Asia: Comer · Bailar · Soñar
overview: Night brings out the most playful side of Asia's metropolises. This docuseries captures the food, drink, music — and night owls who shine in the dark.

trailers.title: Midnight Asia: Eat · Dance · Dream | Official Trailer | Netflix
